dakgalbi.name: Dakgalbi

ingredients.item: . unseasoned rice wine or dry sherry

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs and/or chicken breasts
shiso, or Thai purple basil leaves, divided

ingredients.item: Plus 3 tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil or vegetable oil

instructions: Make the marinade: Finely chop ¼ medium white onion. Peel one 1" piece ginger with a spoon. Smash 3 garlic cloves and remove skins. Slice ginger and garlic. Transfer to a blender and add 5 Tbsp. gochujang (Korean hot pepper paste), 3 Tbsp. unseasoned rice wine or dry sherry, 2 Tbsp. raw or light brown sugar, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. gochugaru (Korean red pepper powder), and 1 tsp. mild Korean curry powder (if using). Purée on high until a loose paste forms (this may take up to 2 minutes depending on your blender). Transfer marinade to a large bowl.
Cut 1 lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs and/or chicken breasts into 1" cubes, add to marinade, and toss to coat. Cover bowl and chill at least 30 minutes and up to 36 hours.

Meanwhile, slice ¼ small green cabbage as thinly as possible. Peel 1 small sweet potato, halve lengthwise, then slice crosswise into ¼"-thick half-moons. Trim stems from 8 perilla, shiso, or Thai purple basil leaves, then cut leaves into quarters.

If using fresh rice cakes, place 18 rice cakes in a large bowl and pour in water to cover. Soak until rice cakes are soft, 7–10 minutes. Drain well in a colander. If using frozen rice cakes, bring a large saucepan or small pot of water to a boil and drop 18 rice cakes into pot, stirring constantly to make sure they don’t stick together. Cook 1 minute, then drain well in a colander. Drizzle ½ tsp. extra-virgin olive oil or vegetable oil over rice cakes and toss to coat (this will prevent them from sticking together).

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil or vegetable oil a large skillet over medium. Combine chicken and any remaining marinade, cabbage, sweet potato, and rice cakes in skillet and cook, stirring often, until chicken is cooked through and sweet potato is tender, 15–17 minutes. Add quartered perilla leaves and cook, stirring, until slightly wilted, about 30 seconds.

Dakgalbi is usually eaten as ssäm-style: To assemble one, place one of the remaining 12 perilla, shiso, or Thai basil leaves on top of one of the 12 lettuce leaves, then top with a small dollop of ssamjang, kimchi, and using chopsticks, add a piece of chicken, sweet potato, and rice cake for the perfect bite—or create ssäm to your preference!

date-coated-hazelnut-brownie-lezzet.name: Date Coated Hazelnut Brownie
instructions: 1. thoroughly pull 150 grams of scraps, cocoa, maple syrup, almonds, vanilla essence, coconut oil, kinoayi, juice and grapes into the kitchen robot.
2. Add nuts and remaining raisins and pull it roughly.
3. Put the mixture into a square cake mold that you sprinkle the cooking paper.
4. Broadcast the mixture evenly with the help of Spatula.
5. Wait in the refrigerator until hardened.
6. Pull the palms for coating, cocoa powder, coconut oil and water into a bowl, smooth with the help of hand blender.
7. Remove Brownie from the tray, sprinkle broadcasting and cocoa beans on the coating.
8. Serve by slitting.

deviled-eggs-with-crispy-shallot-gremola.name: Deviled Eggs With Crispy Shallot Gremolata

ingredients.item: A large star tip and a pastry bag

instructions: Place eggs in a medium pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and cover. Let sit 9 minutes. Remove eggs with a slotted spoon and transfer to an ice bath.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Add shallots and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and transfer to paper-towels; season with salt and let cool.

Peel eggs and halve lengthwise. Pop out yolks and place in a medium bowl; reserve whites. Add mayonnaise, mustard, and lemon juice to yolks and stir with a fork or whisk until very smooth; season with salt and more lemon juice, if desired.
Toss chives, parsley, lemon zest, and reserved shallots in a small bowl; season with salt.

Fit a pastry bag with a large star tip (or use a resealable plastic bag with a hole cut out in the corner). Scoop egg yolk mixture into pastry bag and pipe into egg whites. Top with shallot gremolata before serving.

dipping-sauce-for-ahi-tuna.name: Dipping Sauce For Ahi Tuna
instructions: Mix mayonnaise, sugar, vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, pepper, and cayenne together in a small bowl.
Let sit for 5 minutes before serving.

double-rl-ranch-burger.name: Double Rl Ranch Burger

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: sliced tomato, sliced red onion, and sliced pickles (for serving)

instructions: Mix mayonnaise, ketchup, relish, cornichons, onion, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, and hot sauce in a small bowl; season sauce with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Prepare grill for medium-high heat. Divide beef into 8 portions (about 6 oz. each). Working with 1 portion at a time, cup your hands around the meat and begin to gently shape it into a round patty, being careful not to pack the meat too tightly. Lightly press down on patty to flatten, then press a slight indentation into the center with your thumb (this will prevent patties from bulging when cooked).

Generously season both sides of patties with salt and grill 5 minutes. Turn and top with cheese. Cover grill and cook until cheese is melted and patties are medium-rare, about 5 minutes more. Transfer to a platter and let rest 5 minutes.
Build burgers with buns, patties, bacon, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, and special sauce.

dough-for-a-sweet-tart-argiro.name: Dough For A Sweet Tart

ingredients.item: 100 grbutyre (not too Frozen, cut into tubes)
100 grbutyre (not too Frozen, cut into tubes)

instructions: Shake the flower with the icing on the kitchen counter first.
Add the butter and zest and drizzle with the fingertips to become like wet sand.
Add the yolk and some water, 1-2 tabletspoons, to combine the dough.
We give it a special shape and wrap it in membrane.
Let her rest and freeze for at least 30 minutes.
Spread the dough into a leaf and spread it into a buttered tart.
Fill to the rim of the tart with weights (paint, rice, etc.). and baking for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the weights and bake for 5-10 minutes to brown.
Brush it with egg or white solution to waterproof.
Bake for 3-4 more minutes.
Let it cool and continue with the cream we have chosen.

drunken-vanillas-argiro.name: Drunken Vanillas

ingredients.item: 1 cup vinsanto or other sweet wine
1 cup vinsanto or other sweet wine

instructions: Wash the Fruits, cut them in half and remove the pit.
In a pot, add the water, wine, sugar and cinnamon and bottle over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Add the fruit to the syrup and bottle for 15 minutes.
Then remove the fruits, let them cool a little and remove the peel.
Boil the syrup for about 10 minutes until it thinks.
Let the syrup cool and then remove the cinnamon from the inside.
We pour the vanillas and freeze them.
We serve them in high glasses.

dry-brined-turkey.name: Dry-brined Turkey

ingredients.prep: Garlic and Herb Dry Brine, or Fennel, Chile, and Maple Dry Brine

instructions: Rub dry brine all over turkey; chill uncovered, 6–7 hours.
Preheat oven to 218°C (218°C).
Rinse turkey under cold water; pat dry and place, breast side up, on a rack set in a large roasting pan.
Stuff turkey with onion, garlic, and herbs.
Working from neck end of turkey, gently loosen skin from breasts and rub butter under skin and all over outside of bird.
Tie legs together with kitchen twine, pour broth into pan, and roast turkey for 30 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 163°C (163°C) and roast, basting with pan juices every 30–40 minutes, adding more broth as needed to maintain some liquid in pan, and tenting with foil if skin is browning too quickly, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 74°C (74°C), for 2½–3 hours.
Transfer turkey to a platter; tent with foil.
Let rest at least 30 minutes before carving.

duck-confit-with-orange-and-potatoes-peq.name: Duck Confit With Orange And Potatoes
duck-confit-with-orange-and-potatoes-peq.original_name: Confit de pato casero a la naranja con patatas

ingredients.item: 2 kg of duck fat (you can buy here)
2 cucharaditas de pimienta negra en grano
4 suffered duck thighs (following the recipe or you can buy the dug condt already prepared here)
2 naranjas (una para zumo y otra para rodajas)
Grasa de pato (la utilizada para confitar los muslos)

instructions: We get our 8 dung thighs out of all sides and make sure they're covered. We added the thyme branches, the laurel leaves and the crushed garlic teeth. We let them stand at the refrigerator for at least 12 hours, or all night.

The following day, we remove excess salt and spices from our thighs. We melt the 2 kg of duck fat into a big pan with low heat. We place our thighs in our melted fat and make sure they are completely covered.
We added peppermint and cook with very low heat for about 2 to 3 hours. We keep our temperature low so that it doesn't get to boil.
We have to check that the flesh's tender and gets out of the bone.
Si no vamos a consumirlos de inmediato, podemos conservar los muslos en un recipiente cubiertos con su propia grasa en la nevera.

Prepare an orange sauce: In a small saucer, we warm an orange juice with honey. We let them reduce them to low heat till they weigh slightly. If you wish, you can add a thyme branch to give an aromatic touch. We'll have the salsa booked for the end.

Cooking potatoes in duck fat: We wash and cut potatoes into thin cuts. We heat up a large frying pan with medium-low heat and add enough duck fat to cover the bottom (about 3-4 tablespoons). We added the potatoes into a single cape, we pitted them to taste and we cook them in fat for about 15- 20 minutes and they turned them half-baked and they were put to sleep. They have to be tender inside and golden outside.

Sorting duck thighs: In another frying pan, we heated up some more duck fat at medium-high heat. We place our dedicated thighs with our skin down and cook them about 3-5 minutes, till the skin's golden and crispy. That will also warm the duck inside without losing the crispy skin texture. Add the orange cuts: Once the thighs are golden and crispy, we add the orange cuts to the frying pan with the duck and let them warm up slightly and release their citrus smell. Glaze with an orange sauce: Let's put an orange sauce onto the thighs and potatoes and let the flavors mix for a minute.
Servir: Emplatamos los muslos de pato crujientes con las rodajas de naranja y las patatas doradas en grasa de pato. Podemos decorar con un poco de tomillo fresco.

duck-patties-teleculinaria.name: Duck Patties
instructions: Prepare o recheio: refogue a cebola e os alhos picados num tacho com a manteiga e depois junte a farinha, mexendo sempre. Regue com o leite, misture, tempere com noz-moscada, salsa picada, sal e pimenta e deixe engrossar. Retire do lume, adicione o pato e envolva.
Prepare the dough: light a pot with water, butter and a pinch of salt. When it is boiling, add the flour, in rain and always stirring, then remove from the fire and let it cool.

Extend the dough on a flour-pushed bench, have small portions of the filling on one end and fold with the part of the dough without filling. Cut in half-moon shape and close tight. Repeat until the dough is finished.
Pass the rissols through the egg shakes and bread grated. Fry them in warm and abundant oil, on both sides, then remove them and let them run down on absorbent paper. Serve with a green salad.

dutch-oven-pulled-pork.name: Dutch Oven Pulled Pork
instructions: Preheat the oven to 107°C (104 degrees C). Place a small rack inside a Dutch oven.
Rub pork roast with barbecue spice rub and place on the rack in the Dutch oven.
Cover and cook in the preheated oven until roast is fork-tender, about 8 hours.
Shred the roast with 2 forks and return meat to the Dutch oven with some of the roasting juices and a generous amount of barbeque sauce.
Place on the stovetop and let simmer over medium heat for at least 30 minutes.
